market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Flat @ Leeds Airport – 50% cheaper than average
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your self‑contained flat just minutes from Leeds Bradford Airport. This entire‑home property comfortably sleeps up to four guests, making it ideal for families, friends, or business travelers seeking a hassle‑free stay. Rated an impressive 4.93 from 145 guest reviews, the flat combines a warm, modern interior with the convenience of a prime location.

Inside, you’ll find a bright living area perfect for relaxing after a flight, a fully equipped kitchen ready for any home‑cooked meal, and a comfortable bedroom that guarantees a restful night’s sleep. Free Wi‑Fi and a dedicated workspace keep you connected whether you’re working remotely or planning your next adventure. The flat’s quiet neighbourhood offers easy access to public transport, local shops, and restaurants, while the airport is just a short drive away.

At £77 per night, this flat is priced roughly 50% below the Leeds‑Bradford market median of £154.60, presenting excellent value for savvy travelers. Although current bookings cover only 27.2% of the next 90 days, there’s ample opportunity to enjoy this well‑rated, budget‑friendly stay. Book now and experience comfort, convenience, and savings all in one place.
top_amenity_gaps: Dedicated parking or free on‑site parking
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, well‑lit living‑room shot as the cover photo to showcase the flat’s spaciousness, followed by images of the bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, exterior building, and nearby airport view.
key_diagnosis: Rewrite the title to highlight the £77/night price – about 50% lower than the cohort median of £154.60 – to capture price‑sensitive search traffic.
Add high‑value amenities (outdoor space, parking, entertainment) that are missing, as these categories drive bookings in this market.
Upload at least 8 high‑quality photos covering all major rooms and set the living‑room image as the lead photo to improve visual appeal.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your flat is priced at £77/night—about 50% below the Leeds‑Bradford market median of £154.60—yet it’s only booked 27.2% of the time, leaving plenty of upside.
